---
title: "About"
page-layout: full
body-classes: page-about
---

## Jon Finger

::: {.hud-grid}
::: {.hero-block}
::: {.hero-label}
About Trainer
:::

::: {.hero-lead}
Data scientist. Builder. Recovering academic. I work at the edge where the determinism of the lab meets the stochasticism of the real world.
:::
:::

::: {.status-panel}
::: {.status-panel__title}
History
:::

- 2016-2018: Washington State University - M.S. Biology
- 2019-2020: BloomTech - Data Science
- 2020-2022: District 300 Schools - Data Information Specialist
- 2022-2023: Geotab - Data Analyst
- 2023-Present: Geotab - Data Scientist
:::

::: {.dispatch-panel}
::: {.dispatch-panel__label}
Strategy
:::

1. Impact over assumption.
2. Collaboration over legacy.
3. Empirical over theory.
4. Every anything is possible.
:::

Don't panic -- it's all gluten-free here.

:::
